content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed materialize_beads() implementation end-to-end: CLI subcommand with fcntl flock + pid-liveness attempt tracking; materialize_beads() creates root/workstream/task beads with parent-child hierarchy and resolved blocks dependencies; idempotency via milestone-scope label + identity label + role matching; journal beads_exported event records planned_bead_id_map; load_runtime_bead_membership_refs extends planned refs with actual bead IDs so ready-bead matching works post-export; failures surface without calling sync. Error paths (UnsafeBeadsState, foreign-adapter pending mutations, multi-match ambiguity) are all handled. Tests cover 11 scenarios including idempotency, recovery, cross-milestone isolation, and partial-failure-without-sync. Build is clean. No material correctness or safety bugs found within this bead's scope. The --labels=a,b,c refactor relies on br's comma-separated label format (an inherent br CLI limitation, not a bug in this code).

## Amendments

None.
